subject: Issue-ID: OOM-1189 Upg OOF for common Cassandra
commit_message:
Issue-ID: OOM-1189 Upg OOF for common Cassandra

Signed-off-by: prpatel <pradeep.patel2@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/484/
Topic set to Integration of OOF with common cassandra

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/484/ : FAILURE

No problems were identified. If you know why this problem occurred, please add a suitable Cause for it. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/484/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/484

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Reached, code and make all working fine.
